channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18349] interop: sanityn test_33c: FAIL: Sync-Lock-Cancel not triggered
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/4284d97a-aba7-4937-a991-cd2944263673

test_33c failed with the following error:

== sanityn test 33c: Cancel cross-MDT lock should trigger Sync-Lock-Cancel ========================================================== 12:07:45 (1728043665)
CMD: trevis-72vm6 grep -c /mnt/lustre-mds1' ' /proc/mounts || true
Stopping /mnt/lustre-mds1 (opts:) on trevis-72vm6
CMD: trevis-72vm6 umount -d /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-72vm6 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: trevis-72vm6 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-72vm6 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey >/dev/null 2>&1
CMD: trevis-72vm6 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>&1
CMD: trevis-72vm6 test -b /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
CMD: trevis-72vm6 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
Starting mds1: -o localrecov  /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-72vm6 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov  /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-72vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
CMD: trevis-72vm6 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4 
trevis-72vm6: CMD: trevis-72vm6 hostname -I
trevis-72vm6: trevis-72vm6.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
CMD: trevis-72vm6 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 				2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]{3}[0-9]{4}'
pdsh@trevis-129vm7: trevis-72vm6: ssh exited with exit code 1
CMD: trevis-72vm6 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-MDT0000
CMD: trevis-72vm6,trevis-95vm14 lctl set_param -n os[cd]*.*MDT*.force_sync=1
CMD: trevis-72vm4 lctl set_param -n osd*.*OS*.force_sync=1
CMD: trevis-72vm6 lctl set_param -n mdt.*.sync_count=0
CMD: trevis-72vm6 lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT0000.sync_count
sync_count 0
 sanityn test_33c: @@@@@@ FAIL: Sync-Lock-Cancel not triggered

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/94 - 4.18.0-553.5.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4581 - 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanityn test_33c - Sync-Lock-Cancel not triggered
item.summary: interop: sanityn test_33c: FAIL: Sync-Lock-Cancel not triggered

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: It's the same cause as LU-18350, and this test can be skipped in interop mode.
laisiyao Would you please look into this?

The failure occurred consistently in the following 2.15.5 clients with 2.16.0 servers interop test sessions:
lustre-reviews_el8.10-x86_64_full-dne-part-3
lustre-reviews_el9.4-x86_64_full-dne-part-3
lustre-reviews_el9.4-x86_64_sles15sp5-x86_64_full-dne-part-3
lustre-reviews_el9.4-x86_64_ubuntu2204-x86_64_full-dne-part-3
